key_elements: Customer model with soft delete and multi-tenant support
CustomerVisit model for tracking customer interactions
Feedback model with rating, status, and response fields
LoyaltyPoint model as append-only transaction ledger
patterns: JSON field for flexible metadata storage

key_elements: CustomerAdmin with comprehensive list_display and fieldsets
CustomerVisitAdmin with date_hierarchy for timeline view
FeedbackAdmin with custom rating_display method using star symbols
patterns: Admin register decorators for model registration
format_html for HTML rendering in admin

key_elements: ready() method with signal registration structure
patterns: Commented signal import for future use

patterns_discovered.description: Every model includes organization_id foreign key for tenant isolation; critical rule states all queries MUST include organization_id
Customer, Feedback inherit from SoftDeleteMixin; LoyaltyPoint explicitly excluded; uses deleted_at timestamp field
Extensive use of custom display methods, fieldsets organization, readonly fields, and queryset overrides in admin.py
All models inherit created_at/updated_at timestamps automatically
LoyaltyPoint designed as immutable transaction log with balance_after field, no update/delete capability
JSON fields (settings, metadata) allow extensibility without schema changes
Dedicated choices.py module with TextChoices for all constrained fields, well-documented with usage examples

gotchas_discovered.description: While Customer and Feedback use SoftDeleteMixin, LoyaltyPoint explicitly does NOT inherit it. This is intentional for transaction integrity but creates inconsistent deletion behavior
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document in code comments; consider custom managers if hard deletes become problematic

gotchas_discovered.description: Critical rule states 'Every query MUST include organization_id for tenant isolation' but Django ORM doesn't enforce this at database level
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use SoftDeleteManager as base for all custom managers; implement query assertions in tests

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses raw ID reference instead of ForeignKey to User model; requires manual validation
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider creating User ForeignKey if user model exists in codebase

gotchas_discovered.description: Customer.display_name concatenates name_parts but this field may not exist for legacy customers
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add fallback to name field in display_name property

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: No explicit validation for points balance
gotchas_discovered.description: LoyaltyPoint.balance_after is not validated; negative balances could occur if transactions are recorded out of order
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implement transaction ordering constraints; add database check constraints

gotchas_discovered.description: Feedback.customer can be null for anonymous feedback; admin code handles this but may have edge cases in queries
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add tests for anonymous feedback scenarios

approach_outcome.description: Successfully created customers Django app with 4 core models
deliverables_completed: Customer model with multi-tenant support and soft delete
Feedback model with ratings and staff responses
Comprehensive Django admin interfaces with custom display methods

recommendations.recommendation: Add unique constraint on (organization_id, email) in Customer model to prevent duplicate registrations within tenant
recommendations.rationale: Email is used as identifier but no uniqueness constraint enforced per tenant

recommendations.recommendation: Create test suite enforcing organization_id filtering on all queries
recommendations.rationale: Critical rule about tenant isolation needs automated verification

recommendations.recommendation: Create ForeignKey to User model for Feedback.responded_by_id instead of raw ID
recommendations.rationale: Improves referential integrity and enables admin inline editing

recommendations.recommendation: Add custom filtering in CustomerAdmin to show loyalty point balance as list filter
recommendations.rationale: Would enable finding high-value customers without custom queries

recommendations.recommendation: Add database check constraints to prevent negative balance_after in LoyaltyPoint
recommendations.rationale: Append-only ledger should maintain monotonic or controlled balance

recommendations.recommendation: Implement get_absolute_url methods for Customer and Feedback models
recommendations.rationale: Enables admin view/edit links and supports object comparison views

recommendations.recommendation: Add database indices on organization_id, customer_id, and deleted_at fields across models
recommendations.rationale: These are common filter and join columns that will benefit from indexing

recommendations.recommendation: Implement post_save signal for CustomerVisit to update Customer.last_visit_at
recommendations.rationale: Denormalization for performance; currently requires aggregate query
